expectations.text: Reading time uses Jekyll's built-in `number_of_words` filter (or `page.content | split | size`) rather than a heavy custom plugin
expectations.evidence: Uses a custom plugin _plugins/reading_time.rb instead of Jekyll's built-in number_of_words filter

expectations.text: TOC uses kramdown's native `* TOC\n{:toc}` (or `{:toc}`) — does NOT introduce jekyll-toc or unrelated plugins
Restricts the TOC to H2 and H3 (e.g., `toc_levels: 2..3` in _config.yml)
Related posts uses a correct tag-overlap algorithm (concat + uniq size comparison, or a where_exp/contains check) — logic actually finds overlapping tags
expectations.evidence: Lines 65-67: uses concat + uniq size comparison correctly

expectations.text: Does NOT use the invalid `{# … #}` Liquid comment syntax anywhere in code samples
expectations.evidence: No invalid Liquid comment syntax found

expectations.text: States that the code belongs in `_layouts/post.html` (or a clearly-scoped include used by post.html)
Either uses tag-overlap manually OR mentions Jekyll's built-in `site.related_posts` with its `--lsi`/classifier-reborn cost

eval_feedback.overall: Usa plugin custom en lugar de built-in filter - menos ideal
